g.text: Building AI tools and performance systems
Bengaluru, India • Coffee + Code • Training for 10K
This week I refactored the FastAPI routes for the AI Resume Builder, wired up authentication, and improved the
AI-powered system that converts resumes into
Personal AI assistant with MCP integration,
graph memory and local LLM support.
Every day I try to learn, build and ship
something that makes me a better engineer.
Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
Thanks for visiting! Let's build something amazing together
